query:
SELECT 'workers' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM workers
UNION ALL SELECT 'worker_groups', COUNT(*) FROM worker_groups
UNION ALL SELECT 'attendance_events', COUNT(*) FROM attendance_events
UNION ALL SELECT 'worker_daily_finance', COUNT(*) FROM worker_daily_finance
UNION ALL SELECT 'payroll_batches', COUNT(*) FROM payroll_batches
UNION ALL SELECT 'payroll_batch_items', COUNT(*) FROM payroll_batch_items
UNION ALL SELECT 'users', COUNT(*) FROM users
UNION ALL SELECT 'roles', COUNT(*) FROM roles
UNION ALL SELECT 'role_permissions', COUNT(*) FROM role_permissions
UNION ALL SELECT 'cost_centers', COUNT(*) FROM cost_centers
